title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For August 2023
text: The ProShares S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrat ETF had a strong month in June with a gain of 8.08%, year-to-date the Fund is up 5.72%. I present 3 strategies that can theoretically beat the dividend aristocrat index in the long term. After nearly two full years of tracking these strategies, all 3 buy-and-hold portfolios continue to generate alpha over NOBL and SPY.

title: Stanley Black & Decker raises dividend by 1 cent
text: Stanley Black & Decker SWK, +1.24% has raised its quarterly cash dividend by one cent, to 81 cents a share.

title: Stanley Black & Decker Announces 3rd Quarter 2023 Dividend
text: Board Of Directors Approves Quarterly Cash Dividend Increase To $0.81 Per Share NEW BRITAIN, Conn. , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a worldwide leader in tools and outdoor, announced today that its Board of Directors approved a $0.01 increase of its quarterly cash dividend to $0.81 per common share.

title: Stanley Black & Decker: Let's Go Bottom Fishing, But Not For The Dividend
text: Stanley Black & Decker's stock saw a significant drop of over 65 percent after the initial Covid-19 hype, but the current situation may present a good buying opportunity. The positive development of margins as well as the sustainable reduction of inventory indicate that SWK has just passed the bottom from an operational point of view. The appeal of investment lies in the share price potential that could materialise in the event of a turnaround.

title: Verint Customer Stanley Black and Decker Outdoor Wins Contact Center Excellence Award
text: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #CCWAwards--Verint® (NASDAQ: VRNT), The Customer Engagement Company®, today announced that its customer, Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) Outdoor, is the recipient of the 2023 Customer Contact Week (CCW) Excellence Award for the Best-in-Class Contact Center category (99 seats or less). title: 7 Expected Dividend Increases In July 2023
